query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: Two figures stand on a flat expanse of ground near a waterfront building complex, looking upward at a large paraglider in the sky. The distant architecture spans the lower horizon and includes a low structure with a curved decorative emblem on its roof, alongside additional industrial structures and a tall sign or observation wheel visible in the background. The vertical composition places the small human subjects near the bottom edge beneath a vast sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two figures stand on a flat expanse near a waterfront building complex, looking upward at a large paraglider in the sky. The distant architecture spans the lower horizon with a curved decorative emblem on a low roof. The image is rendered in muted, faded monochrome tones with extremely low contrast, where crushed midtones and weak separation between light and dark produce an oppressive, suffocating atmosphere across the vast empty sky.
